title: House Tour
excerpt: Our house is mostly made up of a mix of new and old - collected and curated mainly for this space, since it's about 3 times the size of our previous tiny 550 square foot apartment. Instead of being 5…
body: Our house is mostly made up of a mix of new and old - collected and curated mainly for this space, since it's about 3 times the size of our previous tiny 550 square foot apartment. Instead of being 5 blocks from the beach, we are now about 5 miles. All of the walls are one of 2 shades of grey - Glidden Silver Birch or Behr Dolphin Fin. We were meticulous about getting this place all set up and ready before Jack's arrival last September. Thankfully that timeline worked out, but it's taken 7 months for me to have it photographed. We made it a rule to only bring in things we love, which turns into quite the eclectic mix. And we are okay with it. The CB2 Fuze dining room table is one of our favorite purchases and something we get lots of compliments on. It feels comfortable and we've set a good pace that works for us when it comes to making it feel like a home. Here's a look at our happy place.
